G0.label:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : Inhabited α
head✝¹ head✝ c : α
l : List α
ih : (c :: l).ilast = (c :: l).getLast?.iget
⊢ (head✝¹ :: head✝ :: c :: l).ilast = (head✝¹ :: head✝ :: c :: l).getLast?.iget

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
inst : Inhabited α
head head_1 c : α
l : List α
ih : (c :: l).ilast = (c :: l).getLast?.iget
⊢ (head :: head_1 :: c :: l).ilast = (head :: head_1 :: c :: l).getLast?.iget
